name: A-ha
bio: A-ha's catalog still earns through 1980s playlist dominance, durable video-era recognition, and long-tail global streaming.
notable_for: Synth-pop recordings with unusually strong visual and melodic recall.
career_highlight: Their signature songs still generate significant long-tail replay decades later.
revenue_drivers: Global nostalgia playlists support recurring streams.
Iconic video-era recognition helps sustain catalog demand.
Film, documentary, and media reuse keep the songs visible.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps A-ha's headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: A-ha's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
